title: Are 'Friends' Electric?
meaning_summary: Its dystopian mood and distinctive electronic identity make it unusually durable for long-tail streaming and catalog discovery.
revenue_drivers: Core fan listening and electronic-catalog discovery sustain recurring streams.
The track's influence value helps keep it relevant in retrospective listening.
Alternative and synth-driven programming support long-tail reuse.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Are 'Friends' Electric? is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
